seoTitle: Vanchip News & Updates | Product Releases & Events | LiTong Distributor
seoDescription: Latest news from Vanchip including new product releases, technology updates, and industry events. Stay informed about RF front-end innovations.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest Vanchip product announcements?
faqs.answer: Latest Vanchip product announcements are available through: (1) This news page - regularly updated with new product releases; (2) LiTong newsletter - subscribe for email updates on new Vanchip products; (3) Product pages - individual product pages show latest releases; (4) Technical support - contact FAE for roadmap information. As an authorized distributor, LiTong receives advance notice of new products and can provide early access for evaluation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's newsletter and check this page regularly for updates on new Vanchip products.

faqs.question: How do I get notified about Vanchip events and webinars?
faqs.answer: Stay informed about Vanchip events through: (1) LiTong events page - upcoming webinars and trade shows; (2) Email notifications - subscribe to event alerts; (3) Technical seminars - regional training sessions on Vanchip products; (4) Online webinars - virtual training on design and application topics. LiTong regularly hosts technical seminars featuring Vanchip products in major cities across China.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's event notifications to receive invitations to Vanchip technical seminars and webinars.

articles.title: Vanchip Launches Next-Generation 5G NR Power Amplifier Series
articles.summary: Vanchip introduces VC5G series power amplifiers delivering industry-leading 42% PAE for n77/n78/n79 5G bands with integrated power detection and MIPI RFFE 2.0 control.
content: Vanchip has announced the release of its next-generation VC5G series power amplifiers, specifically designed for 5G NR sub-6GHz applications. The new series includes the VC5778 for n77/n78 bands and VC7788 for n79 band, delivering industry-leading efficiency and linearity performance.
Key features of the VC5G series include:
- Industry-leading 42% PAE at 26dBm output power
- Support for 100MHz 5G NR bandwidth with EVM < 2.5%
- Integrated power detector for closed-loop control
- MIPI RFFE 2.0 interface for advanced power management
- Compact CSP 2.0×2.0mm package for space-constrained designs
The VC5G series has already been adopted by major smartphone OEMs and is in mass production. Samples and evaluation kits are available through LiTong.
highlights: 42% PAE - highest efficiency in class for 5G high-band PAs
100MHz bandwidth support for full 5G NR capability
Integrated power detector simplifies system design
Compact package enables slim smartphone designs

articles.title: Vanchip Expands IoT Portfolio with Ultra-Low-Power NB-IoT Solutions
articles.summary: New VCNB series delivers sub-1μA sleep current and 35%+ efficiency for battery-powered IoT applications including smart meters, asset trackers, and smart home devices.
content: Vanchip has expanded its IoT product portfolio with the introduction of the VCNB series, specifically optimized for NB-IoT and LTE-M applications. The new series addresses the growing demand for ultra-low-power RF solutions in battery-operated IoT devices.
The VCNB series features:
- Sub-1μA sleep current for extended battery life
- 35%+ power-added efficiency at 23dBm output
- Coverage of low-band frequencies (B5/B8/B20/B28)
- Compact CSP 1.5×1.5mm package for wearable applications
- Dual-mode support for both NB-IoT and LTE-M
These products are ideal for smart meters, asset tracking, smart home sensors, and wearable devices requiring multi-year battery life.
highlights: Sub-1μA sleep current enables 5+ year battery life
Dual-mode NB-IoT/LTE-M support for deployment flexibility
Compact package fits smallest wearable form factors
Cost-optimized for high-volume IoT applications

articles.title: Vanchip Introduces High-Integration FEMs for 5G Smartphones
articles.summary: New VCFEM series integrates PA, switch, and filter functions in single package, reducing PCB area by 60% while maintaining excellent performance.
content: Vanchip has launched the VCFEM series of front-end modules, offering unprecedented integration for 5G smartphone applications. The new FEMs combine power amplifier, RF switch, and filter functions in a single compact package.
Benefits of the VCFEM series:
- 60% reduction in PCB area compared to discrete implementation
- Pre-optimized matching for guaranteed performance
- Reduced BOM count and assembly complexity
- Faster time-to-market with minimal RF tuning
- Available for n77/n78/n79 and 4G mid-bands
The VCFEM series is production-ready and has been qualified by multiple tier-1 smartphone manufacturers.
highlights: 60% PCB area reduction enables slimmer smartphone designs
Pre-optimized performance eliminates matching network design
Reduced BOM cost through integration
Faster product development cycles

articles.title: Vanchip Products Achieve AEC-Q100 Automotive Qualification
articles.summary: Key Vanchip RF products receive AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification, enabling deployment in automotive V2X and telematics applications.
content: Vanchip has announced that its key RF front-end products have achieved AEC-Q100 Grade 2 automotive qualification, opening new opportunities in the growing automotive connectivity market.
Qualified products include:
- VC5G series 5G power amplifiers
- VS series RF switches
- VF series RF filters
These products meet the stringent quality and reliability requirements for automotive applications including:
- Operating temperature range: -40°C to +105°C
- Zero defect quality targets
- Full PPAP documentation support
Automotive applications include V2X communications, telematics, and connected infotainment systems.
highlights: AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualified for automotive applications
Extended temperature range -40°C to +105°C
Full automotive PPAP documentation available
Enables V2X and telematics designs

articles.title: LiTong Strengthens Partnership with Vanchip as Authorized Distributor
articles.summary: LiTong expands Vanchip distribution agreement to include full product portfolio with enhanced technical support and inventory commitment.
content: LiTong is pleased to announce the expansion of its distribution partnership with Vanchip, now covering the complete Vanchip product portfolio including RF power amplifiers, switches, filters, and front-end modules.
As an authorized Vanchip distributor, LiTong provides:
- Full product line availability with stock inventory
- Factory-direct competitive pricing
- Comprehensive technical support from experienced RF FAEs
- Application engineering and design review services
- Reference designs and evaluation kits
- Regulatory compliance support
This partnership enables LiTong customers to access Vanchip's industry-leading RF solutions with local support and fast delivery.
highlights: Full Vanchip product portfolio now available through LiTong
Strategic inventory investment for fast delivery
Enhanced FAE support for complex RF designs
Complete technical documentation and tools
